harness.js:35:6-65:9
> exec(("ps -ef | grep " + name), function(error, stdout) {
  if (error) { reject(error); }
  ;
  var items = stdout["split"](EOL);
  var list = [];
  items["forEach"](function(i) {
  var content = i["split"](" ");
  content = filter(content);
  content = content["reverse"]();
  if (! ! content[0]) { if (! new RegExp("grep|kill")["test"](content[1])) {
  content = content["reverse"]();
  list["push"](content[1]);
} }
});
  if (! list["length"]) { resolve(res); }
  res = res["concat"](list);
  exec(("sudo kill -SIGKILL " + list["join"](" ")), function(error) { reject(); });
});

Reached sensitive command-injection sink 'child_process.exec' with symbolic expr:
(str.++ "ps -ef | grep " payload)

   (argv0 str "")
   (argv1 str "")

   (payload str "")
   (require('process').arch str ""))
